name: Garlic Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1 Chop broccoli into 1-1/2 inch pieces, both the florets and the peeled stems.
2 Heat sesame oil and vegetable oil in a saucepan.
3 Add crushed red pepper to the hot oils and let stand for 10 minutes.
4 Remove from heat and add minced garlic, soy sauce, sugar, and lemon juice. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
5 Steam the broccoli until it is almost tender.
6 Cool under running water.
7 Toss with dressing in a bowl.
8 Serve at room temperature or chilled.
